overall.description: A cinematic game engine shot of a character resting by a roaring fireplace in a medieval castle common room. The scene features warm firelight illuminating stone walls, wooden beams, and red patterned carpets while background characters move through the space.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle common room with central fireplace

events.description: background NPC enters from the left side of the room and walks toward the center
background NPC exits the frame on the right side

agents.ego_description: character is seated on the floor leaning against the sofa near the fireplace, remaining still throughout the clip

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes walking across the common room from left to right

entered.detail: large gothic stone fireplace with arched opening and heavy wooden mantel
bright orange flames burning within the fireplace casting warm light
ornate red and gold patterned carpet covering the stone floor
upholstered sofa with wooden frame that the ego character is leaning against
rough-hewn stone walls with medieval texture and warm ambient lighting
framed portrait hanging on the wall in a gilded frame
dark wooden ceiling beams supporting the high ceiling
green climbing plants decorating the stone wall beside the fireplace

segments.scene_description: A static cinematic view of a medieval castle common room centered on a roaring stone fireplace. The ego character sits on the floor leaning against a sofa in the right foreground, while warm firelight illuminates the red carpets and stone walls. A background NPC walks through the room from left to right, passing behind the seating area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, cinematic focus on a cozy medieval common room centered around the warmth of a roaring stone fireplace. It begins with a static view of the hearth, where flickering firelight casts a golden glow across red patterned carpets and heavy stone walls. As the light dances across the room, the camera captures the ego character resting on the floor, leaning comfortably against a sofa in the right foreground. The scene then subtly shifts in depth as a background character walks steadily from left to right, passing behind the seating area and adding a sense of lived-in movement to the quiet space.
